title: Cheesy Skillet Stracciatella
description: A creamy, cheesy skillet dish made with stracciatella and crispy dutch cheese.
instructions: Butter the skillet and place it in the oven to melt the butter.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the crispy dutch cheese and xtra sharp cheddar cheese.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top with stracciatella.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the stracciatella is heated through.
Serve the cheesy skillet stracciatella hot, garnished with additional crispy dutch cheese if desired.
